name: Ultimate AI RCA - Individual Cases & Final Summary

parameters.jsCode:
const cases = $input.item.json.cases || [];
return cases.map(c => ({ json: c }));

parameters.subject: ={{ '🚨 Failed: ' + $json.testTitle }}
parameters.message:
={{ "

❌ Automated Case Failure

Test File: " + $json.filename + "

Case Title: " + $json.testTitle + "

Duration: " + $json.duration + "

🤖 AI Root Cause Analysis:

" + $json.aiAnalysis.replace(/\n/g, '
') + "

Logs:

" + $json.error + "
" }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '🚨 Failed: ' + $json.testTitle }}
parameters.message:
={{ "

❌ Automated Case Failure (No Img)

Test File: " + $json.filename + "

Case Title: " + $json.testTitle + "

🤖 AI Root Cause Analysis:

" + $json.aiAnalysis.replace(/\n/g, '
') + "

Logs:

" + $json.error + "
" }}

parameters.subject: 🎯 Final Execution Dashboard Summary
parameters.message:
={{ "

🚀 Automation Execution Dashboard

Total Scripts

" + $json.totalFiles + "

Total Cases

" + $json.totalCases + "

✅ Passed

" + $json.passed + "

❌ Failed

" + $json.failed + "

" + $json.html + "
Automated AI Framework generated summary.
" }}
